commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d6af342ffd0c8545ab3d50b102e553a4a6656a8c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a UsageStore startup retry task that schedules one delayed refresh after the initial refresh leaves provider errors or unknown statuses, plus focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main has focused tests for startup status network failure retry/recovery, and the PR's remaining problem is visible from the diff because it adds a second retry task beside that implementation; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer handling is needed because current main appears to supersede the branch, and this repository profile does not enable auto-closing the fresh PR.

target.title: Retry failed startup usage refresh once
target.body:
Summary:

- Retry the initial usage refresh once after a startup network/status failure.
- Keep the retry scoped to providers that actually run background refresh work.
- Cancel the pending startup retry during UsageStore cancellation.
- Keep the retry bounded to one delayed attempt.

Validation:

- ./Scripts/lint.sh lint
- swift test --filter UsageStoreStartupRetryTests
- swift test --filter UsageStoreManualTokenRefreshTests
- CI / lint-build-test
- CI / build-linux-cli (linux-x64, ubuntu-24.04)
- CI / build-linux-cli (linux-arm64, ubuntu-24.04-arm)
- GitGuardian Security Checks

Proof:

- Local lint and focused tests passed before push.
- CI is green on d6af342ffd0c8545ab3d50b102e553a4a6656a8c.
- Runtime app proof still to be added separately if maintainers require it.
target.author: yuxin-qiao

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
